SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.demo

Class DemoMidSemComplexTimedScenario

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_u.components.cvm.AbstractCVM
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.demo.DemoMidSemComplexTimedScenario
All Implemented Interfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.cvm.ComponentVirtualMachineI
public class DemoMidSemComplexTimedScenario extends fr.sorbonne_u.components.cvm.AbstractCVM
Mid-semester timed integration scenario. It uses the ClocksServer + TestScenario/TestStep and covers: FREE + privileged channels, authorisedUsers regex, quota errors, and all message filter families - properties, comparable/multi-values and time windows

      public void deploy() throws Exception
      Crée et publie tous les composants du scénario, puis active le tracing sur les participants pertinents.
      Specified by:

      deploy in class fr.sorbonne_u.components.cvm.AbstractCVM
      Throws:
